programme.title: Flipping Across America
programme.desc: Ken and Anita are tackling a confusing 1970s split-level home; Tarek and Christina are flipping an older southern California home that looks like it hasn't been updated or cleaned since the 60s.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: City Buzz or Garden Bliss in Amsterdam
programme.desc: A newlywed couple relocates from Chicago to Amsterdam. She's transferring her job and wants a quiet neighborhood but he isn't working and craves the excitement of the city center's bustle.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple has outgrown her childhood home, searching for a new start in Grand Rapids, Michigan. She wants to keep the vintage vibe, but he insists on something new and low maintenance.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: Newcomer Charlie Clausen visits the Cambodian temples of Angkor before embarking on a wonderful meander along the Mekong, cruising through beautiful countryside and vibrant villages.

programme.title: Postcards
programme.desc: Brodie visits the Frankston Sand Sculpting Competition. Madeline is in QLD, making furry friends at a Wildlife Sanctuary. Lauren tries a unique high tea in Carlton. And Tim Campbell and Paulini take a tour of iconic CBD spots.

programme.title: The Garden Gurus
programme.desc: Autumn is a great time to consider indoor plant options and the team look at some great indoor pot plant selections and greenhouse designs.

programme.title: The Block: Fans v Faves
programme.desc: Judges Neale Whitaker and Darren Palmer decide on the winners of the challenge. They are given first and second choice of apartments, as well as a bonus $5000 cash to kick-start their renovations.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Empty Nest in Puerto Morelos, Mexico
programme.desc: After raising six kids while running a law firm together, a couple leaves Kansas to live in Puerto Morelos. He wants local culture in the heart of town, but she wants a private paradise.

programme.title: Hello SA
programme.desc: We visit Penola Coonawarra Caravan Park on the Limestone Coast, road trip to Merilli1885 and Hays St Bar and Kitchen on the Fleurieu, meet the cast of Footloose: The Musical and see the Hahndorf Farm Barn.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple has outgrown her childhood home, searching for a new start in Grand Rapids, Michigan. She wants to keep the vintage vibe, but he insists on something new and low maintenance.

programme.title: Flipping Across America
programme.desc: Ken and Anita are tackling a confusing 1970s split-level home; Tarek and Christina are flipping an older southern California home that looks like it hasn't been updated or cleaned since the 60s.

programme.title: Epic Builds
programme.desc: With the clock ticking, builders take on their biggest challenge yet - delivering multiple modular homes to Bribie Island in under 90 days, where one mistake could derail an entire community build.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Keith and Evan tackle a decrepit 1920s house with plenty of original details and hidden charm inside. The vintage vibe inspires Keith to incorporate classic Detroit styles throughout the design.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.sub-title: Peace of Mind is Worth Every Penny
programme.desc: A couple were convinced they could bring their new home up to code, but three kids later, they have even more problems than before.

programme.title: The Block: Fans v Faves
programme.desc: It's the first official day on The Block and the teams discover that over the next 10 weeks they each need to create a three-storey, three-bedroom, three-bathroom luxury apartment.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: Comedian and actress Retta check out a property that feels like the Titanic inside and out, an angled mess of a house with no walls and zero privacy, and a gigantic green box with a nasty backyard.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: Retta heads out into the desert to visit a broken-down cabin with a cat problem, a dust-filled dome and a home stuck in the '70S.

programme.title: Fix My Flip
programme.desc: Page helps a newcomer who has purchased the most high-stakes home of his career, and his reno plans don't match his $2 million price goal.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Slower Pace for an Affordable Price
programme.desc: A Chicago couple looks to sell their condo and buy a house in Puerto Morelos, Mexico. They're searching for a place that has a roof deck with a pool.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: From RV Life to Valencia, Spain
programme.desc: A family of five trades California RV life for Valencia, Spain. Mom is a chef and certified health coach who's going back to culinary school, and Dad will need to give up his job.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Wanting Wide Open Spaces in Pittsburgh
programme.desc: A buyer has saved enough in cash to buy a home in Pittsburgh. She wants a house with several acres outside the city, but her friend and her agent are worried it might be too much for her.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders head to Paris, Texas, to turn an 1800s cabin into a bridal suite, but they suffer a setback when most of the logs are missing tags.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A family of four is building a glamping escape overlooking the Texas Hill Country, but the build process is anything but glamorous. With the rain, challenging terrain, they must work together.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Jackie's team delivers French Doors to find the frame fits incorrectly. A snow machine delivery runs into problems on the melted trail at the Hill's build site. Meanwhile, Kyle slips and falls while installing windows.

programme.title: House Hunters: Cabin Dreams
programme.desc: Partners and their two dogs leave Cape Cod for a cabin in Norway, Maine, searching for a waterfront property. One is a contractor open to renovations, while the other wants a newer build.

programme.title: House Hunters: Cabin Dreams
programme.sub-title: From Dry Desert to Cooler Climes in Arizona
programme.desc: A family and their two dogs are leaving Tucson for a cabin in Mt. Lemmon. They want their kids to explore the forest, she needs to commute to work, and he hopes to get a deck while working from home.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Slower Pace for an Affordable Price
programme.desc: A Chicago couple looks to sell their condo and buy a house in Puerto Morelos, Mexico. They're searching for a place that has a roof deck with a pool.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: From RV Life to Valencia, Spain
programme.desc: A family of five trades California RV life for Valencia, Spain. Mom is a chef and certified health coach who's going back to culinary school, and Dad will need to give up his job.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Wanting Wide Open Spaces in Pittsburgh
programme.desc: A buyer has saved enough in cash to buy a home in Pittsburgh. She wants a house with several acres outside the city, but her friend and her agent are worried it might be too much for her.

programme.desc: A family of four is building a glamping escape overlooking the Texas Hill Country, but the build process is anything but glamorous. With the rain, challenging terrain, they must work together.

programme.desc: Jackie's team delivers French Doors to find the frame fits incorrectly. A snow machine delivery runs into problems on the melted trail at the Hill's build site. Meanwhile, Kyle slips and falls while installing windows.

programme.desc: Partners and their two dogs leave Cape Cod for a cabin in Norway, Maine, searching for a waterfront property. One is a contractor open to renovations, while the other wants a newer build.

programme.sub-title: From Dry Desert to Cooler Climes in Arizona
programme.desc: A family and their two dogs are leaving Tucson for a cabin in Mt. Lemmon. They want their kids to explore the forest, she needs to commute to work, and he hopes to get a deck while working from home.

programme.desc: Newcomer Charlie Clausen visits the Cambodian temples of Angkor before embarking on a wonderful meander along the Mekong, cruising through beautiful countryside and vibrant villages.

programme.desc: We visit Penola Coonawarra Caravan Park on the Limestone Coast, road trip to Merilli1885 and Hays St Bar and Kitchen on the Fleurieu, meet the cast of Footloose: The Musical and see the Hahndorf Farm Barn.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: Comedian and actress Retta check out a property that feels like the Titanic inside and out, an angled mess of a house with no walls and zero privacy, and a gigantic green box with a nasty backyard.

programme.desc: Retta heads out into the desert to visit a broken-down cabin with a cat problem, a dust-filled dome and a home stuck in the '70S.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: From RV Life to Valencia, Spain
programme.desc: A family of five trades California RV life for Valencia, Spain. Mom is a chef and certified health coach who's going back to culinary school, and Dad will need to give up his job.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Wanting Wide Open Spaces in Pittsburgh
programme.desc: A buyer has saved enough in cash to buy a home in Pittsburgh. She wants a house with several acres outside the city, but her friend and her agent are worried it might be too much for her.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Jackie's team delivers French Doors to find the frame fits incorrectly. A snow machine delivery runs into problems on the melted trail at the Hill's build site. Meanwhile, Kyle slips and falls while installing windows.

programme.title: Building Ideas
programme.desc: Discover award winning builds and go behind the scenes of SA's biggest projects such as T2D, SA Aquatic Centre, and the Women's and Children's Hospital. Hosted by Terry Rogers and Jessica Braithwaite.

programme.title: The Block: Fans v Faves
programme.desc: It's the first official day on The Block and the teams discover that over the next 10 weeks they each need to create a three-storey, three-bedroom, three-bathroom luxury apartment.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Slower Pace for an Affordable Price
programme.desc: A Chicago couple looks to sell their condo and buy a house in Puerto Morelos, Mexico. They're searching for a place that has a roof deck with a pool.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: From RV Life to Valencia, Spain
programme.desc: A family of five trades California RV life for Valencia, Spain. Mom is a chef and certified health coach who's going back to culinary school, and Dad will need to give up his job.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Wanting Wide Open Spaces in Pittsburgh
programme.desc: A buyer has saved enough in cash to buy a home in Pittsburgh. She wants a house with several acres outside the city, but her friend and her agent are worried it might be too much for her.

programme.title: Postcards
programme.desc: Brodie visits the Frankston Sand Sculpting Competition. Madeline is in QLD, making furry friends at a Wildlife Sanctuary. Lauren tries a unique high tea in Carlton. And Tim Campbell and Paulini take a tour of iconic CBD spots.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: Newcomer Charlie Clausen visits the Cambodian temples of Angkor before embarking on a wonderful meander along the Mekong, cruising through beautiful countryside and vibrant villages.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: Comedian and actress Retta check out a property that feels like the Titanic inside and out, an angled mess of a house with no walls and zero privacy, and a gigantic green box with a nasty backyard.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: Retta heads out into the desert to visit a broken-down cabin with a cat problem, a dust-filled dome and a home stuck in the '70S.

programme.title: Fix My Flip
programme.desc: Page helps a newcomer who has purchased the most high-stakes home of his career, and his reno plans don't match his $2 million price goal.

programme.title: House Hunters: Cabin Dreams
programme.desc: Partners and their two dogs leave Cape Cod for a cabin in Norway, Maine, searching for a waterfront property. One is a contractor open to renovations, while the other wants a newer build.

programme.title: House Hunters: Cabin Dreams
programme.sub-title: From Dry Desert to Cooler Climes in Arizona
programme.desc: A family and their two dogs are leaving Tucson for a cabin in Mt. Lemmon. They want their kids to explore the forest, she needs to commute to work, and he hopes to get a deck while working from home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders head to Paris, Texas, to turn an 1800s cabin into a bridal suite, but they suffer a setback when most of the logs are missing tags.

programme.title: Home Town Takeover
programme.desc: Ben and Erin are ready to serve Wetumpka's sole female police officer and youth advocate with the surprise renovation of her dreams.

programme.title: Australia's Best Pools
programme.desc: A reno project that delivers style, safety and fun in Sydney, something new and different a pool for ... dogs and on the waterfront of one of Australia's best beaches sits this acclaimed architect's latest pool.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A New York couple won $7 million on the lottery and said goodbye to hard work in the Big Apple and hello to sunny retirement in Florida. David Bromstad helps them shop for the perfect property.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: An attorney and single father of a three-year-old son scored $1 million on the Mega Millions. Now he's ready to move out of his rental and find the perfect father-son forever home.

programme.title: Renovation Nation
programme.desc: In southern Scotland, Rosi and Antony bring their farmhouse ceiling down. And in Orpington, Naomi and Shemar start to renovate their 1930s semi.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.desc: A young couple finds their beautiful dream home located on a golf course, but its rundown, outdated design is far from their dream. Tamara and her team save the day by completely renovating this mansion.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Best Friends and Bunkmates in Florida
programme.desc: Longtime friends are hoping to pay all cash for a home in New Port Richey, Florida. One dreams of a single-family ranch with a backyard, but the other wants a two-story home with an HOA.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Newlyweds look to realize their dream of living in downtown Los Angeles. They're looking for something with plenty of space to entertain, but their dollars may not stretch very far in the condo market.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Paradise and Practicality in Phuket, Thailand
programme.desc: A married couple chases a new adventure by moving from her home in Jordan to Phuket, Thailand.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: After years of jumping from one city to the next, a young couple visits the Hague, Netherlands, for the first time, where they're looking for their first long-term home.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt Renovation
programme.desc: A family with three young kids finds their forever lake home in Otter Tail County, Minnesota. However, it is far from turnkey and the massive renovation may derail their lakeside living dreams.

programme.title: Holiday Homes in the Sun
programme.desc: Property expert Amanda Lamb, presenter JB Gill, and DJ and presenter Sam Pinkham are in Woolacombe, competing to find their favourite holiday rental.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Best Friends and Bunkmates in Florida
programme.desc: Longtime friends are hoping to pay all cash for a home in New Port Richey, Florida. One dreams of a single-family ranch with a backyard, but the other wants a two-story home with an HOA.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders head to Paris, Texas, to turn an 1800s cabin into a bridal suite, but they suffer a setback when most of the logs are missing tags.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Paradise and Practicality in Phuket, Thailand
programme.desc: A married couple chases a new adventure by moving from her home in Jordan to Phuket, Thailand.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: After years of jumping from one city to the next, a young couple visits the Hague, Netherlands, for the first time, where they're looking for their first long-term home.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt Renovation
programme.desc: A family with three young kids finds their forever lake home in Otter Tail County, Minnesota. However, it is far from turnkey and the massive renovation may derail their lakeside living dreams.

programme.title: Holiday Homes in the Sun
programme.desc: Property expert Amanda Lamb, presenter JB Gill, and DJ and presenter Sam Pinkham are in Woolacombe, competing to find their favourite holiday rental.
